title: Expand the post-H5 parity correction to include department certification before resuming M1
execution_plan_ref: Operations/EXECUTION_PLAN.md § Initiative: Authoritative Persona Humanization Merge to Development

completion_summary.restored_merge_handback: M1 is now blocked only by a fresh governed merge replay from the corrected source branch; development remains unpushed.

principles: truthful final authoritative workforce claims before branch integration
fail-closed merge governance when any certification layer disagrees with the final registry truth
anti_alignment: Does NOT push development while any certification layer remains stale.
Does NOT change already truthful final registry, activation, or packaging surfaces.
Does NOT widen into staging, main, or release-tag work.

user_stated_requirements: continue from the blocked governance state
create the next required governed scope-correction package
stay aligned to AGENTS.md, rules, and governance
intent_capture.intent_verification: R1 through R7 capture the bounded scope correction needed to let the parity repair legally satisfy the full M1 validation surface.

objective: Widen the blocked post-H5 parity correction just enough to include department certification, then rebase persona certification, department certification, and the enterprise release gate to the final authoritative `59 / 54 / 5 / 430` truth.

options_considered.description: Create a bounded follow-on scope-correction package that legally includes department certification before retrying M1.
pros: Fixes the newly proven real blocker.
Keeps development unpushed until every required certification layer is truthful.
cons: Adds one more blocker package before M1 can resume.

options_considered.description: Continue with the current post-H5 parity package and ignore the department-certification gap.
cons: Cannot satisfy the declared M1 validation slice.

options_considered.description: Patch department certification directly on local development after the blocked merge.
pros: Repairs the local merge state in one place.
cons: Moves correction work onto unvalidated development rather than the dedicated feature branch.

complexity_warning.statement: Reworking the already truthful final registry or activation surfaces would add complexity without addressing the actual blocker, which is stale certification parity plus an incomplete correction allowlist.
complexity_warning.simpler_path: Repair only the stale persona-certification, department-certification, and enterprise-release-gate boundary on the correction branch, then rerun M1.

in_scope: prove the current post-H5 package scope gap from live repo truth
rebase registry/persona_certification_v1.yaml to the final post-H5 state
rebase registry/department_certification_v1.yaml to the final post-H5 state
rebase registry/enterprise_release_gate_v2.yaml to the final post-H5 state
update the corresponding verifiers and tests
publish notebook-backed proof, scorecard, and generated verification output
update trackers so M1 is truthfully blocked by this package until green
scope.scope_fence_rule: Stop and re-scope if the fix appears to require changes outside the stale persona-certification, department-certification, and release-gate boundary.

requirements.description: Make the current post-H5 package scope gap explicit from live repo truth and L82 evidence.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: The package records the blocked local merge commit, the truthful final surfaces, the stale certification surfaces, and the notebook-backed proof that the current package cannot satisfy M1.
requirements.user_intent_trace: continue fail-closed and create the next required governed package

requirements.description: Produce MA-backed proof for unified final post-H5 persona, department, and release-gate parity.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: A new notebook-backed unified certification proof, invariant, and scorecard exist and are green.

requirements.description: Rebase persona certification and department certification to the final `59 / 54 / 5` truth.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: persona_certification_v1 and department_certification_v1, plus their commercialization contracts, reflect the final post-H5 truth without staged-count drift.

requirements.description: Rebase the enterprise release gate to the final `59 / 54 / 5 / 430` truth.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: enterprise_release_gate_v2 and its commercialization contract reflect the final post-H5 truth and final routed-action count.

requirements.description: Update commercialization contracts, verifiers, and tests to the unified final parity state.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: targeted verifiers and tests mechanically enforce the corrected final persona, department, and release-gate boundary.
requirements.user_intent_trace: test each phase and do not move on until it passes

requirements.description: Validate the correction branch and restore M1 to a truthfully unblockable state.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: targeted validation, pre-commit, and diff-check are green, and trackers record that M1 may resume only after a fresh merge replay.
requirements.user_intent_trace: fail-closed handback to the merge phase

requirements.description: Commit and push the correction branch before M1 resumes.
requirements.acceptance_criteria: the correction branch is committed, pushed, and clean.
requirements.user_intent_trace: commit and push before moving on

tasks.name: Freeze the unified blocker truth
tasks.description: Capture the blocked merge evidence, the L82 scope-gap proof, and the exact stale-versus-final certification mismatch.
exit_criteria: The package records both the truthful final state and the stale staged certification layers.
The blocked local development merge remains unpushed.

tasks.name: Derive the unified certification proof
tasks.description: Define the final post-H5 persona, department, and release-gate formula, lemmas, and invariant obligations.
exit_criteria: Final certification and release-gate counts are mathematically pinned to the final post-H5 truth.
tasks.validation_command: echo "L83 unified certification parity proof defined"

tasks.name: Notebook-first unified correction
tasks.description: Prove the unified certification correction in notebooks and extract only after notebook assertions are green.
deliverables: corrected persona, department, and release-gate certification surfaces
exit_criteria: Notebook outputs prove the final post-H5 certification boundary.

tasks.name: Validation and scorecard
tasks.description: Run targeted verifiers, tests, scorecard replay, pre-commit, and diff-check.
exit_criteria: The stale post-H5 certification parity gap is mechanically closed.
M1 can be retried from a truthful source branch.

tasks.name: Extraction handback
tasks.description: Commit and push the correction branch, then mark M1 blocked only by fresh merge replay.
exit_criteria: The correction branch is pushed and clean.
M1 is ready for a fresh merge replay, not for a blind push.
